name: Road to the Runway
overview: "Road to the Runway" is China’s first reality TV show dedicated to selecting Victoria’s Secret supermodels. Through a 90-day training camp and competition, the eventual champion earns a direct spot on the runway of the 2017 Victoria’s Secret Fashion Show in Shanghai.

trailers.title: 《天使之路》完整版：[第1期]奚梦瑶助阵长城走秀 长腿女孩激怒任性评委
